text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I spot Manhattan Cafe and Agnes
Tachyon mid-conversation...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here comes your trainer now. Excellent
timing. We could use another body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Research, of course. Perhaps you've heard about
the supernatural sightings? You know, the
so-called "Seven Wonders" of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've been curious as to how such encounters affect
us. That's why I brought Cafe along to
investigate.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Can't you do this by yourself? Why do I have to
come...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so cold, Cafe. I chose you because I
could think of no one better to observe the
unseen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And now... Heh. We have someone else here who
I imagine you've had quite the influence on! I
have high expectations for our results!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come then, my investigators-in-arms! To the
world of the unknown! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She won't listen to a word anyone says when she gets like this. I'm sorry, but could you help me entertain her for a while?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join Agnes Tachyon on her tour to investigate
the paranormal activity occurring throughout the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch a glimpse of what looks like someone
dancing on the roof... but with the setting sun in
view, it's hard to tell what I'm seeing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Case One. "The Dancing Shadow on the Roof."
Unfortunately, this one seems to be a dud.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see nothing that would be mistaken for a
dancing shadow, and there's still enough light out
that I doubt I'd miss anything.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, enough of that! There are plenty more
rumors where that came from. Onto the next one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon marches on with the two of us
following behind, decidedly confused.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Case Four is "The Weeping Voice in the
Nighttime Hallway." ...But I don't hear a thing, so
nothing here either, I suppose. Next!

text_block_list.name: Weeping Voice
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Case Nine, "The Eerie Sound from the Stump."
Hm... Nothing abnormal to report here either?!

text_block_list.name: Sound Coming from the Stump
text_block_list.text: Groan... Growl...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, we made the rounds, but didn't have a single paranormal encounter! I expected something with you two around... What a shame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My own experience has been one bizarre thing
after another, but our trip around the academy
ends before I can decide whether to mention any
of it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...So, are we done now? Okay, I'm going to head
home...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hold on! This is where we initiate Plan B. I realize our lack of findings was down to my spearheading of the investigation. As such...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I'd like to hear your opinion. Adding
another perspective to our observation methods
could eliminate my cognitive bias.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, what do you think I should do next?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm. In other words, there's no saving tonight's
investigation? In that case, I'll take your advice
and conclude.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Marching us around all night... You're too pushy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I do apologize for that. I had no idea we'd
end up so entirely empty-handed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it would've been a better use of my time
to observe you instead, Cafe. Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...She never changes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Thank you for humoring her tonight...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Along with Agnes Tachyon, Manhattan Cafe
leaves for the dorm. And as she does, I sense a
certain warmth emanating from her...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wouldn't have expected that from a
trainer! But that makes the suggestion all the
better!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We'll investigate each of the rumors again.
Perhaps the time of day is a contributing factor.
Cafe, I expect you'll be joining us too?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Well, if Trainer thinks this is a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Truly, I am indebted to your trainer! Now
then, what discoveries await us this time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, please don't tell Tachyon about what
you witnessed today.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think... she has to see it all with her own two
eyes... Otherwise, she won't be convinced... or
even happy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come along, you two! Time is of the essence!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Agnes Tachyon's expectations
ultimately go unmet, over the course of the night,
I get to witness the peculiar relationship she
shares with Manhattan Cafe.
